since_last: 52% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.78% · Gold +1.27% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 52% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.16%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.16%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.50%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.50%, LRCX +7.91%, TER +6.97%, MU +6.89%, KLAC +6.83%. Laggards: IBM -5.45%, CRM -5.14%, NOW -5.13%, WDAY -4.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.23% at $151.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
